title: Crawling
meaning_summary: Crawling remains a strong Hybrid Theory earner because it is one of Linkin Park's defining singles and keeps emotional replay value across rock and nostalgia playlists.
revenue_drivers: strong fan replay from Hybrid Theory

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is modeled from Linkin Park catalog demand, replay intensity, and likely band-side participation.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not modeled as a fully sold song position
ownership.notes: Hybrid Theory remains unusually concentrated in a few high-recognition singles.
